name: Validate client_id Isolation
description: After writing any Python backend file, check for multi-tenancy violations

then.prompt: Review the file just written for multi-tenancy violations. Check: (1) Every Neo4j Cypher query has a client_id WHERE clause. (2) Every database write includes client_id. (3) No cache key is missing client_id as a component. (4) No code path can serve data from one client to another. (5) ChromaDB searches use the client-namespaced collection. If any violation is found, fix it immediately before continuing.
